title: honey, are we really gonna talk about polynomial time in times like this?

body: There have always been certain words I've been drawn to, merely for their existence:
" fatalistic, space, bloom, homage, oblique, doodle, coincidence, liminal, money, silhouette, synthetic, fold, echo, shenanigans, artefact, parse, cherry….absurd".
Then one night, you wonder what is wrong with you, and find out there's a specific name for people like you. Logophile. WTF. Honestly, rude, given the fact that I like you, but only as a friend.

Talking about breaking off, drift apart, slip away, go your own way….you can call it….another lonely day. As I spend my last (lovely) day in my first full-time position at the rock research institution aka GFZ (not Dwayne Johnson).

Amusingly, I realized that once upon a time I came up the hill and it was raining, and then I left down the hill and it was raining, and I swear to god in the meantime we did not have any dubious deviation in weather.

title: focal points, vector spaces and a byzantine saint (teasingly) staring at me

body: "Go to the left, find the stairs, go down, follow the red lines on the floor," three instructions to follow is still manageable, I thought to myself as I tricked the ticket seller into giving me a student discount.
A modern, ugly concrete bench, white point-focused artificial LED light, uncomfortable air conditioner settings and suspiciously familiar shoes.

Subject A attempted to induce a prolonged visual fixation on me. I knew wearing my maybelline red lipstick was a tactically dangerous thing to do, though I never considered its impact on inanimate objects.
Oh boy, you better keep an eye out at the Gemäldegalerie as the eerie saints of the past might be just watching you in return.
